ItacAcademyItem.Name: Malinconici (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Pyramid with four statues by it
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Dates of this Academy according to Quadrio, Storia e ragione d`ogni poesia, I, p. 99. Perhaps this is the same Academy mentioned by Maylender, Storia delle Accademie d`Italia, vol. IV, p. 34.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
